CONTENT.Club career: Bayramov made his debut for Qarabağ on 23 September 2019, in the Azerbaijan Premier League match against Zira.
CONTENT.External links: Toral Bayramov at SoccerwayToral Bayramov at www.uefa.com
CONTENT.International career: He made his debut for Azerbaijan national football team on 27 May 2021 in a friendly against Turkey.

SUMMARY: Toral Bayramov (born 23 February 2001, Lankaran) is an Azerbaijani footballer who plays as a left-back or a winger for Qarabağ FK in the Azerbaijan Premier League and the Azerbaijan national football team.
